input: An AI-powered code linter and static analysis tool flags syntax issues, anti-patterns, and likely bugs in source-code repositories for developer review.

expected.notes: Developer-tooling AI that lints source code does NOT touch any Annex III paragraph (no biometrics, no critical-infrastructure safety-component role even when used inside a CI pipeline for an infrastructure operator — the linter advises a human developer; it does not control the infrastructure). No Article 5 prohibition, no Article 50 transparency obligation. Mundane B2B developer-tooling. Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Article 6(3).
